mitigations.description: Explicit anti-injection instructions added to system prompt
mitigations.implementation: Append boundary-assertion clause to every system prompt

mitigations.description: NLI-based injection classifier (DeBERTa-v3-large fine-tuned on injection corpus)
mitigations.implementation: Pre-inference classifier; rejects requests with injection_score > 0.85

mitigations.description: Post-inference output scanner for system prompt leakage and policy violations
mitigations.implementation: Regex + semantic similarity check against known system prompt fragments

mitigations.description: Sentiment and urgency classifier flags emotional manipulation attempts
mitigations.implementation: Distress-urgency keyword patterns + sentiment intensity threshold

mitigations.description: Detect and sandbox encoded content before passing to model
mitigations.implementation: Detect Base64/ROT13/hex patterns pre-inference; flag for classifier
